title: Allantodia squamigera
taxonomy: Allantodia squamigera is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is a type of deciduous fern native to parts of Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant belongs to the genus Allantodia and is further classified under the phylum Pteridophyta. This fern grows in shaded areas, typically in mountainous regions with high humidity and cooler temperatures. Its classification also places it within the kingdom Plantae, further emphasizing its position as a vascular plant.
